rationale: Pragmatic deferral consistent with Phase 7 pattern (07-01 IMDb URLs, 07-02 placeholder assets, 07-03 fast-path QA acceptance). Real perf signal will come from production telemetry after DNS swap, not synthetic Slow-4G simulation.
